_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture; grounded in Wildberger (2005) Divine Proportions Wild Egg Books ISBN 978-0-9757492-0-8 and Cormen (2009) Introduction to Algorithms MIT Press ISBN 978-0-262-03384-8 Ch.22 BFS. -->
description: 5-cycle P0-P1-P2-P3-P4-P0, anchors P0/P2. NOT a tree. Nodes P3 and P4 are equidistant from both anchors; edge P0-P4 has Δb=1, Δe=0 and edge P2-P3 has Δb=0, Δe=1. AGS_1 fails because Δ values include 0, violating the ±1 tree property.
